title: scabiosa frutescens
intro: Scabiosa frutescens, also known as prickly scabious or scabiosa, is a perennial plant native to southern Europe and the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help soothe wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of scabiosa frutescens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues such as diarrhea and ulcers. Scabiosa frutescens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
